description: Product description This Victorian Maid costume for children is perfect for fancy dress parties, Halloween costumes, book day events, cosplay occasions, and imaginative play. The size medium Maid costume includes a plain white top, a long brown skirt with an attached white apron, a brown waistcoat with golden fastening, and a white hat. The bonnet style mop cap takes inspiration from that worn by a maid in the Victorian Era, really bringing this costume to life and making it perfect for school history days! Although this outfit is best suited for the Victorian Era, small adjustments can be made for use in other historical periods, such as the Edwardian or Tudor Era. Whether for imaginative play or to bring your favourite book to life for book day celebrations, the possibilities are endless! Accessories are sold separately. Available in 2 sizes: MEDIUM / ages 7-9, and LARGE / 10-12. The medium children’s costumes are designed to fit height 134 cm, chest 69 cm and waist 61 cm, while the large children’s costumes are designed to fit height 152 cm, chest 78 cm and waist 68 cm. All Henbrandt fancy dress costumes are tested to both EN71 and Nightwear Safety standards. Safety Warning WARNING! Strangulation Hazard, Long Chord. Keep away from fire.
